label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz secured third consecutive Vuelta title with stage 21 ITT win by 14 seconds over CORT NIELSEN Magnus, overturning deficit in final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam gained 29 seconds on HAIG in first half of ITT but cracked spectacularly in second half, revealing pacing misjudgment.
ROGLIC nearly went wrong way at cordon but recovered to overtake CORT NIELSEN only in final approach, suggesting marginal superiority.
BAHRAIN VICTORIOUS pressure management sustained through entire Grand Tour enabled HAIG to defend podium despite YATES attack.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: admitted second half was toughest he remembered, suggesting overpacing ITT strategy cost him podium finish
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: held podium against aggressive YATES ITT attack despite being 29 seconds down at midpoint
rider_signals.CORT NIELSEN Magnus: positive: three stage wins plus near-miss fourth in final ITT contradicts assumptions he left legs behind earlier
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: neutral: retired on own terms with peace of mind as former Vuelta champion
